sourceMovie.title: The Package
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit The Package for the same reason it broke through in 1989: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Andrew Davis keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The crime and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Package clicked for you, John Wick: Chapter 2 (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Package?
faq.answer: Try John Wick: Chapter 2, Run All Night, Faster—each shares DNA with The Package while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Package?
faq.answer: The Package (1989) is best described as Crime, Thriller, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Package worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this crime lane.
